languages.text: {n}Их движения, стойки, то, как они стоят, кажутся странными. Вскоре вы понимаете — на планете попросту нет ровных поверхностей. Даже массивные корни покрыты бугристой корой. И походка, и особая, чуть согбенная стойка меровцев появилась из-за постоянной попытки сохранять баланс.{/n}

{n}Their movements and stances look peculiar. Then you realise — there is simply no flat terrain anywhere on the planet. Even the massive roots are covered in lumpy bark. The Merovians' odd gait and slightly stooped posture are products of their constant effort to maintain their balance.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Их движения, стойки, то, как они стоят, кажутся странными. Вскоре вы понимаете — на планете попросту нет ровных поверхностей. Даже массивные корни покрыты бугристой корой. И походка, и особая, чуть согбенная стойка меровцев появилась из-за постоянной попытки сохранять баланс.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Their movements and stances look peculiar. Then you realise — there is simply no flat terrain anywhere on the planet. Even the massive roots are covered in lumpy bark. The Merovians' odd gait and slightly stooped posture are the result of their constant attempts to maintain their balance.{/n}

{n}Their movements and stances look peculiar. Then you realise — there is simply no flat terrain anywhere on the planet. Even the massive roots are covered in lumpy bark. The Merovians' odd gait and slightly stooped posture are products of their constant effort to maintain their balance.{/n}

{n}However, you also notice certain peculiarities in the way these Guardsmen move. Then you realise — there is simply no flat terrain anywhere on the planet. Even the massive roots are covered in lumpy bark. The Merovians' odd gait is the result of their constant attempts to maintain their balance.{/n}

{n}Their movements and stances look peculiar. Then you realise — there is simply no flat terrain anywhere on the planet. Even the massive roots are covered in lumpy bark. The Merovians' odd gait and slightly stooped posture are the result of their constant attempts to maintain their balance.{/n}

{n}Their movements and stances look peculiar. Then you realise — there is simply no flat terrain anywhere on the planet. Even the massive roots are covered in lumpy bark. The Merovians' odd gait and slightly stooped posture are products of their constant effort to maintain their balance.{/n}

languages.text: {n}しかし、彼らの歩き方に奇妙な特徴があることに気づきます。この惑星には平坦な地は存在せず、巨大な根もデコボコした樹皮で覆われています。メロヴィアンの奇妙な歩き方は、常にバランスを保とうとする結果なのです。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}However, you also notice certain peculiarities in the way these Guardsmen move. Then you realise — there is simply no flat terrain anywhere on the planet. Even the massive roots are covered in lumpy bark. The Merovians' odd gait is the result of their constant attempts to maintain their balance.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Hareketleri ve duruşları tuhaf görünüyor. Sonra, gezegenin hiçbir yerinde düz arazi olmadığını anlıyorsun. Devasa kökler bile pütürlü ağaç kabuklarıyla kaplı. Merovluların tuhaf yürüyüşü ve hafif kambur duruşu, dengelerini korumaya yönelik sürekli çabalarının bir sonucu.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Their movements and stances look peculiar. Then you realise — there is simply no flat terrain anywhere on the planet. Even the massive roots are covered in lumpy bark. The Merovians' odd gait and slightly stooped posture are products of their constant effort to maintain their balance.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Hareketleri ve duruşları tuhaf görünüyor. Sonra, gezegenin hiçbir yerinde düz arazi olmadığını anlıyorsun. Devasa kökler bile pütürlü ağaç kabuklarıyla kaplı. Merovluların tuhaf yürüyüşü ve hafif kambur duruşu, dengelerini korumaya yönelik sürekli çabalarının bir sonucu.{/n}

languages.text: {n}他们的动作和站姿看起来很古怪。很快你便反应过来，这行星上根本没有平地，就连巨型根须也覆满树皮疙瘩。梅罗夫人那古怪的步态和微微佝偻的姿势，是因为他们无时无刻不在努力维持平衡。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Their movements and stances look peculiar. Then you realise — there is simply no flat terrain anywhere on the planet. Even the massive roots are covered in lumpy bark. The Merovians' odd gait and slightly stooped posture are products of their constant effort to maintain their balance.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}他们的动作和站姿看起来很古怪。很快你便反应过来，这行星上根本没有平地，就连巨型根须也覆满树皮疙瘩。梅罗夫人那古怪的步态和微微佝偻的姿势，是因为他们无时无刻不在努力维持平衡。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Ihre Bewegungen und Haltungen sehen sonderbar aus. Dann wird dir klar ... es gibt auf dem gesamten Planeten kein flaches Gelände. Selbst die gewaltigen Wurzeln sind in unebene Rinde gehüllt. Der seltsame Gang und die leicht gebückte Haltung der Merovianer ist dem ständigen Versuch geschuldet, das Gleichgewicht zu halten.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Their movements and stances look peculiar. Then you realise — there is simply no flat terrain anywhere on the planet. Even the massive roots are covered in lumpy bark. The Merovians' odd gait and slightly stooped posture are products of their constant effort to maintain their balance.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Ihre Bewegungen und Haltungen sehen sonderbar aus. Dann wird dir klar ... es gibt auf dem gesamten Planeten kein flaches Gelände. Selbst die gewaltigen Wurzeln sind in unebene Rinde gehüllt. Der seltsame Gang und die leicht gebückte Haltung der Merovianer ist dem ständigen Versuch geschuldet, das Gleichgewicht zu halten.{/n}

languages.text: {n}La façon dont ils se tiennent et se déplacent vous intrigue. C'est alors que vous vous rendez compte qu'il n'y a tout simplement aucun terrain plat sur cette planète. Même les racines, pourtant gigantesques, sont recouvertes d'une écorce bosselée. La démarche étrange des Meroviens et leur posture légèrement voûtée tiennent à leurs efforts constants pour garder l'équilibre.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Their movements and stances look peculiar. Then you realise — there is simply no flat terrain anywhere on the planet. Even the massive roots are covered in lumpy bark. The Merovians' odd gait and slightly stooped posture are products of their constant effort to maintain their balance.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}La façon dont ils se tiennent et se déplacent vous intrigue. C'est alors que vous vous rendez compte qu'il n'y a tout simplement aucun terrain plat sur cette planète. Même les racines, pourtant gigantesques, sont recouvertes d'une écorce bosselée. La démarche étrange des Meroviens et leur posture légèrement voûtée tiennent à leurs efforts constants pour garder l'équilibre.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Sus movimientos y postura son peculiares. Es entonces cuando te das cuenta de algo: no hay terreno llano en todo el planeta. Incluso las grandes raíces están cubiertas de corteza rugosa. El extraño paso de los merovianos y su postura ligeramente encorvada es fruto de su constante esfuerzo por mantener el equilibrio.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Their movements and stances look peculiar. Then you realise — there is simply no flat terrain anywhere on the planet. Even the massive roots are covered in lumpy bark. The Merovians' odd gait and slightly stooped posture are products of their constant effort to maintain their balance.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Sus movimientos y postura son peculiares. Es entonces cuando te das cuenta de algo: no hay terreno llano en todo el planeta. Incluso las grandes raíces están cubiertas de corteza rugosa. El extraño paso de los merovianos y su postura ligeramente encorvada es fruto de su constante esfuerzo por mantener el equilibrio.{/n}
